ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the employee on performance goals */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started working */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee's manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact for the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who is a manager */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of employees managed */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" REAL /* Score given during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "goals_set" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee's next review period */,
  "areas_for_improvement" TEXT /* Areas where the employee can improve */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_history" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary was effective */,
  "salary_amount" TEXT /* Amount of salary for that period */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, cost of living adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee possessing the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "proficiency_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Expert) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Relevant certifications or licenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_skills_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training course record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who completed the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of course completion */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_courses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., Present, Absent, Leave) */,
  "reason_for_absence" TEXT /* Reason for absence (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefits record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health Insurance, Retirement Plan) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount or value of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., HR, Manager, Employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view employee data, manage benefits) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "onboarding_processes" (
  "onboarding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each onboarding process */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee being onboarded */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the onboarding process */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the onboarding process was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the onboarding process (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("onboarding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_onboarding_processes_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary adjustment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the salary adjustment */,
  "new_salary" TEXT /* New salary amount after adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the salary adjustment (e.g., promotion, cost of living adjustment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_adjustments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "payroll_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll */,
  "gross_pay" TEXT /* Gross pay for the payroll period */,
  "net_pay" TEXT /* Net pay for the payroll period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_off_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time off request */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee requesting time off */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time off period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time off period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the time off request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_off_requests_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance goal */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee the goal belongs to */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for completion of the goal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the performance goal (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_goals_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
